title: Institutional Deployment Wedge
description: Start with one workflow, docket it, canary it, monitor it, rollback if needed.
thesis: One workflow earns the right to scale.

title: Value Realization Control Room
description: Accepted proof → capability → value ledger → capacity allocation → harder missions.

title: Evolution Ledger Control Room
description: Public proof commitments, attestations, selection records, challenge windows, rollback receipts.
thesis: The ledger remembers proof, not secrets.

title: Open-Ended Work Engine
description: Open-ended work generation tethered to proof gates.

title: Proof-Backed Upgrade Rights Room
description: Proof, eval, scope, canary, monitoring, rollback, and challenge window.
thesis: The artifact earns an upgrade right.

title: Proof-Carrying Artifact Foundry
description: Turn raw output into scoped, evaluated, rollbackable proof-carrying artifacts.

title: Real-Task Benchmark Bridge
description: Real-task manifest, equal-budget baselines, replay, cost/risk, validators.

title: Capability Compounding Lab
description: Mission → proof → Chronicle → capability → harder mission.

title: Evidence Docket Theatre
description: Turn public-safe claims into reviewable Evidence Dockets.
thesis: A proof page is not a marketing page.

title: Falsification Gauntlet
description: Baselines, stress, replay, privacy, risk, and falsification.

title: Multi-Agent Institution
description: Compare raw swarms to proof-governed institutions.

title: Proof Gradient Lab
description: Score is advisory; gates are mandatory.

title: Proof-Settlement Chronicle Lab
description: Request → Escrow → Execute → ProofBundle → Validate → Settle → Chronicle.

title: Proof-to-Action Command Room
description: Move from objective to docket to decision to action graph.
thesis: The deliverable is a governed decision state.

title: Sovereign Experience Stream Lab
description: Experience streams, reward ledgers, router proposals, temporal options.

title: Research Spine
description: Research lineage and paper-to-product mapping.

title: Proof Run 001 Docket
description: First real repository-readiness Evidence Docket.

title: Public Proof Ledger
description: Evidence, reports, pages, and reviewer paths in one public ledger.
thesis: One registry for every proof surface.

title: Frontier Release Room
description: Restriction, access, rollback, and restore decisions under proof gates.

title: Docket Builder
description: Guided construction of proof artifacts.

title: Proof Console
description: Interactive command center and proof state visibility.

description: Browser-local user entry demo.

description: Replay, accept, reject, revise, or dissent.

description: Commit-reveal, challenge, dissent, and validation ceremony.
thesis: Trust is not one judge. It is a validator council.
